headline: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
summary: Author Dave Eggers addressed OpenAI staff. He criticized ChatGPT, stating it's “silencing an entire generation.” Eggers shared concerns about AI's impact on writers and the arts.

headline: Google might not kneecap the Pixel 11a with an old processor
summary: Leaks suggest the Pixel 11a will feature the flagship Tensor G6 processor. This reverses the trend of the Pixel 10a using a previous-gen chip. The move addresses past disappointment over budget Pixel processors.

headline: Google is open-sourcing its 3D emoji
summary: Google is making its 3D emoji available for public use. Creators can now integrate Google's 3D pictograms into their own projects. The company revealed design details as part of World Emoji Day.

headline: GoPro’s discounted Max 2 bundle includes $100 worth of accessories
summary: The GoPro Max 2 accessory bundle is now discounted to $369. This deal includes $100 worth of essential accessories. It offers a more affordable entry into 360-degree action camera capture.

headline: The Best Deals Today: PNY RTX 5070 OC, Apple AirPods 4, The Dark Knight Trilogy, and More
summary: IGN highlights today's top tech and entertainment deals. Discounts include the PNY RTX 5070 OC graphics card and Apple AirPods 4. The Dark Knight Trilogy is also featured among current sales.

headline: Steam Machine Engineers at Valve Signal Grim Future as Memory Crisis Is 'Still Getting Worse'
summary: Valve's Steam Machine engineers warn of a worsening memory crisis in tech. This crisis is driving up prices for crucial components. Concerns are growing over the future cost and accessibility of hardware.

headline: Call of Duty Movie to Take Place in the Modern Warfare Universe, Director Confirms
summary: The upcoming Call of Duty movie will be set in the Modern Warfare universe. Paramount Pictures and Activision confirmed the film's setting. This decision aligns the movie with a popular game franchise storyline.

headline: Christopher Nolan's Long and Winding Road to The Odyssey
summary: Christopher Nolan's latest epic, “The Odyssey,” is explored. The film reportedly draws on his nearly three-decade career. The article delves into the inspirations and themes throughout Nolan's work.

headline: Andy Burnham to scrap digital ID to focus on cost of living in first major policy pledge
summary: Incoming Prime Minister Andy Burnham pledges to scrap digital ID plans. His government will prioritize the ongoing cost of living crisis. This marks his first major policy announcement as PM.

headline: Ruthless plotter? Flip-flopper? Dad dancer? Insiders reveal the real Andy Burnham
summary: Laura Kuenssberg investigates the true persona of Andy Burnham. Over 20 people who know him share insights into his character. The piece aims to uncover the real person behind the politician.

headline: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
summary: An Iranian attack in Jordan resulted in two US troop fatalities. One US troop member is reported missing after the strike. Hostilities have re-escalated with US and Iran trading strikes across the Gulf.

headline: Mother killed while asleep with baby ‘was my world’, sister tells BBC
summary: Kirandeep Kaur was killed in her sleep alongside her baby and husband. Her sister shares the family's devastation in India. The incident has left a family grieving the sudden loss of a loved one.
